MAP.COMMENT: metric names, types and help texts

array.name: xml
array.value: Maximum number of threads available for triggers and document processing
Number of threads currently in use for triggers and document processing
Number of threads still available for triggers and document processing
Maximum number of threads available for document processing (limited by Execution Threads Throttle setting)
Number of threads currently in use for document processing
Number of threads still free for document processing

BRANCH.COMMENT: only if trigger globalSettings are present

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: Nothing to do, just cleanup pipeline

record.name: type
record.value: only the type, not the metric name, will be exported from metrics

Values.value: The state of a universal messaging trigger 0 = STOPPED, 1 = RUNNING (meaning retrieval active) , -1 = OTHER

record.name: type
record.value: Only the comment, not hte metric name, will be extracted from the metrics

record.name: type
record.value: only the type, not the metric name, will be exported from metrics

Values.value: The processing state of a universal messaging trigger 0 = suspended 1 = active (meaning processing active) , -1 = any other state

record.name: type
record.value: Only the comment, not hte metric name, will be extracted from the metrics

record.name: type
record.value: only the type, not the metric name, will be exported from metrics

Values.value: Number of threads actively processing documents for this trigger

record.name: type
record.value: Only the comment, not hte metric name, will be extracted from the metrics

record.name: type
record.value: only the type, not the metric name, will be exported from metrics

Values.value: Maximum number of threads processing documents for this trigger

record.name: type
record.value: Only the comment, not hte metric name, will be extracted from the metrics

record.name: type
record.value: only the type, not the metric name, will be exported from metrics

Values.value: Number of persisted messages in the trigger's prefetch queue

record.name: type
record.value: Only the comment, not hte metric name, will be extracted from the metrics

record.name: type
record.value: only the type, not the metric name, will be exported from metrics

Values.value: Number of volatile (not persisted) messages in the trigger's prefetch queue

record.name: type
record.value: Only the comment, not hte metric name, will be extracted from the metrics
